summary: Introduce schema-first Workbench v2 as the replacement path for the abandoned Workbench variants.
rationale: This PR intentionally lands the usable Workbench v2 slice across the React transcript UI, BFF v2 routes, schema-first transcript store, conversation prompt contract, runtime progress/result display, and provider configuration. The old local Workbench attempts were backed up and cleaned from main; the replacement path must land as one reviewed PR so the UI, BFF contract, transcript persistence, runtime display data, and model-provider settings stay consistent.
dependency_rationale: Workbench v2 depends on the committed provider/runtime configuration shape and the branch already includes dependency-control changes from the schema-first work. The dependency file is reviewed with the UI/BFF/runtime slice so local dev, CI, and the conversation-agent model provider use the same contract.
config_behavior_rationale: The config/env changes expose the model-provider settings consumed by the Workbench v2 conversation agent while the behavior changes add the transcript/runtime path that uses those settings. They must be reviewed together so the agent loop cannot silently run with an unsupported provider contract.
verification: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_static_frontend.py tests/test_react_workbench_cutover_gate.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_agent_workbench_contract.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
CI=1 pnpm --dir apps/web-react exec vitest run src/lib/stream/agentStream.test.ts src/lib/stream/agentStreamReducer.test.ts src/lib/stream/agentStreamView.test.ts --run

uv run pytest tests/test_workbench_v2_service.py tests/test_workbench_v2_runtime_service.py tests/test_workbench_v2_agent_loop.py tests/test_workbench_v2_prompt_contract.py tests/test_workbench_v2_routes.py tests/test_workbench_v2_runtime_runner.py tests/test_runtime_control_candidate_truth.py -q
deletion_targets: local dirty main Workbench variants that were backed up before cleanup
runtime status projections that show synthetic state instead of runtime-backed progress
risks: The v2 transcript must remain the single UI fact source and must not reintroduce old projected transcript chains.
Provider configuration changes must stay aligned with the conversation-agent prompt contract.
Runtime display must reflect persisted runtime progress/results rather than frontend-only optimistic state.
The PR is intentionally broad and should not be merged without green governance, Workbench, Python, and frontend checks.
